summary: Iteration 4 — Visual/UX iteration verification: header solid-cream + ink/brand nav legibility on every route, new PageHero on shop/categories/heritage/wholesale/contact/wishlist/cart, masterpiece home hero with chapter '01', active-route highlighting, mobile menu, and cart-enquiry regression. Backend pytest 17/17 PASS (no API changes). Frontend: every navigated route (/, /shop, /categories, /heritage, /wholesale, /contact, /wishlist, /cart) shows the 6 nav links with computed color rgb(42,29,26) ink for inactive and rgb(106,26,42) brand for active. Verified that after scroll on / and /heritage, ink color is unchanged (no more onHero theme-switch). Header background is the solid cream rgba(253,251,247,0.97). PageHero present on all 7 non-home pages and home retains data-testid='hero-section' with chapter '01'. Shop hero shows chapter '02' as expected. Mobile menu toggle opens drawer with ink-colored mobile-nav-* links, brand color for active route. Cart regression: seeded marda_cart_v1 with Royal Maroon Pheta qty 2, page-hero rendered, order-ref MS-EUGD-2905 visible, subtotal ₹1,798 shown, cart-checkout-whatsapp disabled when empty (disabled attr present), enabled after filling name+phone (attr removed), cart-mobile-bar visible at 390px. Wishlist empty state renders 'Nothing saved yet.' headline and wishlist-shop CTA 'Browse the collection' (initial false-negative was a loading-state timing artefact, confirmed visible after networkidle).
critical_code_review_comments: header.tsx is well-scoped; navigation is now deterministic (no theme prop). Good readability win.
page-hero.tsx is reused with consistent props (chapter, eyebrow, marathi, headline, height) — keeps page heros visually coherent and easy to extend.

Wishlist 'Browse the collection' CTA is gated behind !loading; an automated test that hits the page immediately after navigation may see a transient absent CTA. Not a real bug, but consider rendering the empty-state skeleton even during loading=true (or showing the CTA unconditionally when wishlist is empty) so the test signal is stronger and the user never sees an empty page during fetch.

Carry-over from iteration_3 (not retested here): handleSend in /app/frontend/src/app/cart/page.tsx still awaits submitCartEnquiry before window.open — popup-blocker UX hardening still pending (low priority).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Frontend test seeded localStorage marda_cart_v1 with one Royal Maroon Pheta (qty 2, price 899, mode retail); cleared localStorage marda_wishlist_v1 for empty-state check.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header is now ALWAYS solid cream bg-[#FDFBF7]/[0.97] with text-ink nav and text-brand active. PageHero (data-testid='page-hero') is on /shop, /categories, /heritage, /wholesale, /contact, /wishlist, /cart. Home keeps data-testid='hero-section' with chapter '01'. Backend test cmd: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. No API changes in this iteration.
rca_of_the_issue: No bug to RCA. Visual/UX iteration verified end-to-end.
